title: Crispy Pork Belly (Siu Yuk)
method: Make vertical slits along the meat side about 1.3cm deep. Season the meat side with five spice, brown sugar, garlic powder
Create a tin foil boat around the meat, and dry in fridge overnight with skin side up
Add enough salt to fully cover the skin
Place in a 300F / 150C oven for 1.5 hours. The meat will cook and shrink, becoming taller
Remove salt from the skin and brush with a layer of oil
Remove foil. Air fry/grill at 450F / 230C for 20-25 mins until skin is puffed and golden.
notes: Rock salt prevents the pork from getting too salty and is easy to remove.
Serve with a 1:1 mix of hoisin and water
